questions.question: Explain two performance optimization techniques used in distributed systems.
keyPoints: Load balancing distributes requests across multiple servers to prevent overload
Caching stores frequently accessed data to reduce access latency
Parallel processing divides tasks into smaller sub-tasks for concurrent execution
Content Delivery Networks (CDNs) geographically distribute content to reduce latency

questions.question: Discuss the challenges and solutions in balancing performance, security, and energy efficiency in cloud computing environments.
keyPoints: Performance-Security tradeoff: encryption overhead vs. data protection needs
Performance-Energy tradeoff: computational intensity vs. power consumption
Security-Energy tradeoff: continuous monitoring vs. energy costs
Adaptive systems that dynamically adjust based on priorities
Holistic design approach considering all three aspects from inception
Case studies from major cloud providers demonstrating balanced approaches
Emerging technologies like AI optimization for balancing these factors
